title: Yashubiy #3433
definition:
Jashubi-lehem = "returner of bread"

 1) a descendant of Shelah, the son of Judah by Bath-shua the Canaanitess
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jashubi-lehem = "returner of bread"

 1) a descendant of Shelah, the son of Judah by Bath-shua the Canaanitess

    NASB:  returner of bread, a man of Judah
